creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
I thought I was special, but I guess I’m just like everybody else in this city 😕🇩🇰 

I was in the Meat Packing District and wanted to film the “Copenhagen Bakery Experience” for my massive Youtube video about the best things to do in the Danish capital. So I joined the queue and ended up getting a very welcome surprise…

Do you have a favourite bakery in Copenhagen? And what do you think about the price? 🤠

#copenhagen #copenhagenfood #traveltips

transcription.text: I've got another confession to make. I've lived in Copenhagen for over 10 years but there's one thing I've never understood. Are people trying to use a 42 kroner croissant as some kind of status symbol or are these bad boys actually worth the money? I was pretty confident people just have too much money lying around but to be sure I headed over to Heart Bakery in the meatpacking district where I got the famed cardamom croissant. As you know there's nothing I hate more than admitting being wrong but it turns out I've been a fool and the hype is in fact real guys. You really should head over to Heart Bakery when you're in Copenhagen.
